productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Dunkfest White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk Fest 2 has a high heel counter to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries when playing sport. Coupled with an uber cool look, it has a superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk Fest 2 a huge favourite both on the court and off it. If you enjoy wearing a sporty look, simply pair the Dunk Fest 2 with jeans and casual tees.UpperSynthetic upper with mesh cut-outs for breathabilitySynthetic overlays and reinforced overlays at the heel counter for enhanced shoe structureHigh profile design provides ankle supportHigh ankle cup for added support and snug Fit to the back-foot and anklePadded tongue and sock-liner for snug fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for snug fitMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionOutsolePuremotion tooling-inspired outsoleTorsion system for midfoot integrityNon-marking outsoleShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
